title: umi400h — 对外汇报 review report
pipeline_html:
1. S1 segment index — enumerate segments + join each episode's ego2 video location
  2. S2/S3 motion + gripper stats — per-segment low-dim facts (head trans range/path/speed, gripper range/std/flips per arm)
  3. S4 text embeddings — SigLIP2 text encoder over segment labels/sst
  4. S5 visual embeddings — SigLIP2 background-frame encoder
  5. S6 dedup facts — text buckets, candidate visual pairs, action/grip distances (facts only, no verdict)
  6. S7 verdict — apply confirmed thresholds + priority order over S1-S6 facts -> keep/drop_reason (the only stage that decides keep/drop)
  7. S8 report — this static review site
  8. S9 materialize — write an approved S7 verdict into a loadable segment tree
